title: AsyncFunctionStatusObject
description: Schema for AsyncFunctionStatusObject in Nuix REST API

done.description: True if the task is done.  False otherwise.

cancelled.description: True if the task is cancelled.  False otherwise.

token.description: The user token for the task.

functionKey.description: The function key to use when querying status.

updatedOn.description: Date at which the Async function was last updated represented in milliseconds since the epoch.

requestTime.description: Date at which the Async function request was made represented in milliseconds since the epoch.

startTime.description: Date at which the Async function request was started represented in milliseconds since the epoch.

finishTime.description: Date at which the Async function request was finished represented in milliseconds since the epoch.

caseName.description: Name of the case on which the Async function was performed.

hasSuccessfullyCompleted.description: Indicated whether the Async function has successfully completed.

friendlyName.description: Friendly name for the Async function.

caseLocation.description: Location of the case on which the Async function was performed.

requestor.description: Username for user who requested the Async function.

licenseShortName.description: The license used when executing the Async fucntion.

options.description: Options used during the execution of the Async function.

participatingInCaseFunctionQueue.description: True if participating in the case function queue.  False otherwise.

processedBy.description: The server ID that processed the task.
